name: PowerReviews Ratings & Reviews API
what_it_does: PowerReviews REST API for ratings, reviews, and user-generated content platform for retail and brand e-commerce. Enables AI agents to manage product review collection and moderation workflows, handle review syndication across retail partner networks, access review analytics and sentiment data for product intelligence, retrieve questions and answers (Q&A) data for customer support automation, manage review display and filtering configuration, handle review response and brand reply workflows, access visual UGC (photos, videos) from customer reviews, retrieve competitive review benchmarking data, manage retailer-brand review syndication and data sharing, and integrate review data with product information, merchandising, and customer experience platforms.
use_cases: Moderating product reviews from content management agents
Analyzing review sentiment for product insights from merchandising agents
Syndicating reviews to retail partners from brand content agents
Responding to customer Q&A from customer service agents
not_for: B2B software reviews without consumer product retail context
Service industry reviews without physical product and retail context
Internal employee feedback without customer-facing UGC management
best_when: A retailer or brand using PowerReviews wants AI agents to automate review moderation, sentiment analysis, Q&A response, syndication management, and product insight extraction from UGC.
avoid_when: CONTENT RISK: Automated review moderation can suppress legitimate customer feedback — moderation decisions should include human review for edge cases. Automated brand responses to reviews should be reviewed for accuracy before posting; incorrect responses can damage brand reputation. Review manipulation (incentivized reviews without disclosure) violates FTC guidelines.

auth.notes: PowerReviews uses API key authentication. Per-merchant API credentials. REST API with JSON responses. Developer documentation at developer.powerreviews.com. Review syndication network API for retailer-brand data sharing. No native webhooks — polling-based data retrieval. Integrated with major e-commerce platforms (Salesforce Commerce Cloud, SAP Commerce, Magento).

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual platform subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; product count and review volume determine pricing
pricing.notes: Chicago, Illinois. Founded 2005. Private ($85M+ funding). Retail ratings and reviews market. 1,000+ brand and retailer customers. Review syndication network connecting brands and retailers. Strong in home improvement, sporting goods, and grocery retail. Competes with Bazaarvoice for enterprise ratings and reviews platform.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; bulk export for large review datasets

known_agent_gotchas: CONTENT RISK: Automated moderation decisions on reviews should include human review for borderline cases; suppressing legitimate reviews has regulatory and reputation risk
FTC disclosure required — incentivized reviews must include disclosure; automated review request workflows must comply with FTC endorsement guidelines
No webhooks — implement polling for new review ingestion; frequency depends on review volume and moderation SLA requirements
Syndication network — retailer-brand review syndication has separate API endpoints and data access agreements; configure syndication permissions carefully
Review response — automated brand responses must be reviewed before posting; incorrect or tone-deaf responses cause brand reputation damage
UGC media — photo and video review content requires separate media handling; media URLs may expire; implement media caching for permanent storage
agent_readiness.security_notes: E-commerce review UGC. GDPR, CCPA. API key. US. Product reviews and customer-generated content.

security_score_components.security_notes: Retail review data. GDPR, CCPA. API key. US. Customer review and UGC data.
